description: IDC acquisition of additional 25% equity stake in Zambia Fertiliser and Chemicals Company (ZAFCO), increasing IDC's total shareholding to 75%. ZAFCO is a strategic fertiliser manufacturer supporting Zambia's food security agenda.
risks: CCPC merger approval pending. Forex availability for transaction settlement.
notes: CCPC Phase 1 review completed with no objections. Transaction expected to close Q2 2025.

description: ZMW 500 million SME development finance facility providing medium-term loans to Zambian SMEs in manufacturing, agro-processing, and tourism sectors. Co-financed with AfDB USD 50 million facility.
risks: SME credit risk elevated due to economic conditions. Forex risk on AfDB facility.
notes: 340 million disbursed to 185 SMEs. 2,400 jobs created. AfDB satisfied with implementation progress.

description: 750 MW hydropower project on the Kafue River, doubling Zambia's hydropower capacity. Constructed by ZESCO and Sinohydro Corporation under a Chinese government concessional loan.
risks: Final commissioning delays. Debt service obligations on Chinese loan.
notes: Construction at 92% completion. First two units expected to be commissioned Q2 2025. Full commissioning Q3 2025.

description: Expansion of Lubambe Copper Mine in the Copperbelt Province to increase annual copper production from 25,000 to 45,000 tonnes. ZCCM-IH holds 20% equity stake.
risks: Copper price volatility. Underground mining technical risks. Community relations.
notes: Phase 1 shaft sinking completed. Phase 2 underground development in progress. Production ramp-up expected 2026.

description: Rehabilitation of 180 km of mainline track on the Livingstone-Mazabuka corridor, the highest-priority section of the Zambia Railways network. Works include track replacement, ballast renewal, and bridge rehabilitation.
risks: Contractor performance. Procurement delays. Seasonal flooding.
notes: Contract awarded to Aveng Rail. Mobilisation completed. Track works commenced February 2025.
